name: Kelly Dépêches leather handbag
description:
AUTH Hermes Kelly Depeches Briefcase, Rouge H, RARE BOX LEATHER!

Coveted Hermès Kelly Depeches handbag! This is not the normal size 34 or 25 style like you see EVERYWHERE. This is the very rare Size 38 version. This also isn't the common Epsom or Togo leather version; this is in beautiful BOX leather.

This is the epitome of Hermès craftsmanship, and traces its silhouette and roots to the very first Kelly bags from 70 years ago; worn by Hollywood elite, royalty, and First Ladies. A Kelly Depeches in this size and this color AND in BOX LEATHER is virtually impossible to find. This is the dream combination! Get this one while you can!

This bag is of course 100% guaranteed AUTHENTIC, but do realize it is used and may have some flaws. I purchased it and quickly realized I already had too many similarly sized bags, including another Kelly Depeches and other luxury French fashion houses bags. So my loss is your gain!

Its features include:

-Leather rolled top handle
-Smooth box leather
-Palladium Kelly closure and hardware
-the option to add a removable shoulder strap...which transforms this iconic style into a multi-functional piece; switch from a classic tote/briefcase to a crossbody or shoulder bag in one fell swoop.

*Note: clochette and lock/keys not included.

Being Hermès, the craftsmanship is impeccable and much attention to detail was given. Just holding it your hand or wearing it across your body, you can feel the sheer luxury.

If you aren't buying it for yourself, it would make a fabulous gift!


Please view all pics closely and ask all questions/additional photos prior to bidding. *There may be small imperfections, as this is box leather it shows it character; but that no bearing on the overall beauty of the exterior.

Buy with confidence as I have listed and sold countless luxury goods. I am a connoisseur so all of my items are 100% AUTHENTIC and personally curated/purchased/owned by me.
